message:
chore(artifacts): regenerate RaptorQ and conformance oracle artifacts

Refresh benchmark and conformance bundle sidecars, scrub reports, and
decode proofs after ufunc fixture changes. Update ufunc oracle output
and differential report to match the expanded ufunc implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
